_comment: Pinned copy of the Atlas evidence ids that the SprintSight promo console cites.
Upstream source of truth: the sight repo, docs/data/data-strategy.md section 6
('Example:'), which is a SEPARATE git repo and therefore cannot be read by this
test suite on a runner, a container or a fresh clone.
Pinning them here gives the contract a gate that runs everywhere. The live
cross-repo check in page.test.mjs still runs wherever the sight repo is present
(ORAC, prod) and will fail if upstream drifts from this file -- at which point
update this fixture in the same commit as the page copy, so the diff is the
Only Atlas has ids recorded in section 6. Boreas/Cygnus/Draco are covered by the
convention-conformance test instead; see the note above it in page.test.mjs.
